modelResponses.text:
The tool has been discovered. Now I can use it to simulate the repository change and create a pull request. The tool has two parameters:
1. repo - the repository name (default: "octo-org/benchmark-demo-repo")
2. requestedChange - the change description (default: "Fix a typo in README setup steps and clarify the benchmark command.")

Let me call this tool with the default values or I can specify custom ones. Since the user didn't specify particular values, I'll use the defaults.

arguments.requestedChange: Fix a typo in README setup steps and clarify the benchmark command.
